arts.ttl: Christian Pulisic to AC Milan, Clint Dempsey to Fulham and Tim Howard to Everton: The most brilliant USMNT transfers, all-time
arts.sum: With the transfer window looming and more decisions on the way, GOAL rates the five most impactful USMNT transfers, those moves that ended up defining an era for both the players and their clubs. From Pulisic's move to the Rossoneri to Dempsey signing with the Cottagers, GOAL looks at the five greatest USMNT transfers
